description:
Model a row of three identical detached townhouses and install solar panels on each.

1. Draw a rectangular footprint: 6m wide (East-West) × 10m deep (North-South).
2. Extrude walls to 6m height.
3. Create a Gable Roof with the ridge running East-West (creating a South-facing slope and North-facing slope). The roof height should be approx 2-3m above the walls.
4. Create two copies of this building to make a row of 3 units total, spaced 3 meters apart along the East-West axis (approximate X coordinates: 0m, 9m, 18m).
5. Use Skelion to place flush-mounted solar panels on the South-facing roof slope of ALL THREE units.
6. Ensure panels do not bridge the gaps between buildings.
7. Save the model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\townhouse_row_solar.skp'.
